THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT FREDERICKS, TAYLOR RICHARDSON RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ROBERTS, KATHERINE $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $225.00, NO PROPER BUILDING PERMITS PER 2008 NOTICE AND 2012 ABATEMENT ORDER, THEREFORE LANDLORD NOT ENTITLED TO DAMAGES (LOST RENT) FOR TENANT'S FAILURE TO GIVE FULL NOTICE TO VACATE. SALAZAR V. MARADEAGA (1992) 10 C.A. 4TH SUPP. 1, 4, AND CASES CITED THEREIN. CROSS-CLAIM JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT FREDERICK'S AND AGAINST PLAINTIFF ROBERTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $0.00.
